title: LeQube Cobblemon
description: The official LeQG™ community modpack, built for Fabric!
body: ![](https://image.noelshack.com/fichiers/2025/09/5/1740765307-new-content.jpg) ## LeQube Cobblemon on Fabric 1.21.1 Unleash your inner Pokémon Trainer with the LeQube Cobblemon Modpack. Designed for both seasoned players and newcomers to the Pokémon universe, this exceptional modpack allows you to immerse yourself in a world where Minecraft and Pokémon converge seamlessly on the modern platform of Minecraft 1.21.1. ## Key Features: #### Pokémon Integration: Catch, train, and battle with your favorite Pokémon, seamlessly integrated into the Minecraft environment. Experience the thrill of hunting for Pokémon in diverse biomes, just like in the classic games. #### Optimized Performance: Built on the robust Fabric 1.21.1 framework, this modpack offers enhanced performance and stability, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable gameplay experience without sacrificing the authentic Pokémon feel. #### Exploration and Adventure: Embark on quests, discover hidden secrets, and challenge Pokémon Gyms scattered throughout the world. Each adventure is tailored to provide a rich and engaging experience that keeps you coming back for more. #### Community and Interaction: LeQube Cobblemon is crafted for the LeQG™ community, fostering a collaborative and interactive environment. Share your progress, trade Pokémon, and participate in community events to enhance your journey. ## Why LeQube Cobblemon? This modpack was developed out of a passion for both Minecraft and Pokémon, merging two beloved worlds into one extraordinary experience. With LeQube Cobblemon, we aim to provide players with an opportunity to explore and enjoy the wonders of both franchises, all while benefiting from the technical advancements of the latest Minecraft versions. Whether you're a veteran Pokémon Trainer or new to the series, this modpack offers something for everyone. ## Join Us in This Exciting Adventure: Ready to embark on a journey where Pokémon and Minecraft meet? Download LeQube Cobblemon and dive into a universe where every block and every Pokémon tells a story. Start your adventure today and let the blend of nostalgia and innovation guide you.
